misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Of course we wait for Marco/Sandman/Viz translation too but this is what PuckTheGreat(Worstgen user who always translate) posted: Chopper: Zoro!! Quick! Get him into the building!! Chopp
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Of course we wait for Marco/Sandman/Viz translation too but this is what PuckTheGreat(Worstgen user who always translate) posted: Chopper: Zoro!! Quick! Get him into the building!! Chopper: Everyone please gather all those that are either injured or collapsed!! Broccoli Blade 🥦 (@Broccoli_Blade) We literally see chopper asking zoro to bring all the injured to him. Zoro is fine. Learn to read 😂 — https://nitter.net/Broccoli_Blade/status/2044679539587272993#m

misc.title: Good, slow, controlled reps with a squeeze! Next time you do these, try this and I know it should a little crazy. as you press down, focus on pushing the EZ bar more with your pinky and ring fingers.
misc.text: Good, slow, controlled reps with a squeeze! Next time you do these, try this and I know it should a little crazy. as you press down, focus on pushing the EZ bar more with your pinky and ring fingers. I know, sounds crazy but trust me, it works and you'll feel it in the tricep.

misc.title: And before you say, "But Sanji," yes, Sanji also got trashed, I've mentioned that often; his kick was easily blocked. So why don't I have to explain the scene with Sanji? Unlike some Zoro fans, Sanji
misc.text: And before you say, "But Sanji," yes, Sanji also got trashed, I've mentioned that often; his kick was easily blocked. So why don't I have to explain the scene with Sanji? Unlike some Zoro fans, Sanji fans admit it and don't accuse me of lying, but Zoro fans do.
